title: 今回だけはどうしても

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Partway through the summer camp, I learn that
the younger racer I've been so enamored with
won't get to run in the autumn Tenno Sho—just
because there aren't enough slots.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It feels like it's my fault—like I'm getting in the
way of my oshis. I'm feeling like I should never
have debuted at all, when my trainer reminds
me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The pain Umamusume feel today becomes their
strength tomorrow. They can overcome any
difficulty! And that's why I love them so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know the younger racer will get over this. That's
why I can't let it bring me down!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll race with all my strength for her. I'll take all
the passion of every Umamusume I've ever raced
against and use it to confront Opera O and Doto!
